title: Crispy German Fried Rice
description: A German-inspired twist on the classic fried rice dish, topped with crispy onions and served with a side of steamed bean sprouts.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onions and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cooked rice, sauerkraut, and grains to the wok.
Stir-fry until the ingredients are well combined, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the bean sprouts and stir-fry for another minute.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and garnish with crispy onions.
Note: You can customize this recipe by adding your favorite protein or spices.
